context.goal: Establish a stable post-reset baseline before functional checking.
stimulus_intent: Assert the detected reset using the inferred polarity.
Release reset conservatively and observe interface stabilization.
timing_assumptions: Do not assume completion before it becomes externally visible.

llm_todo_blocks.end_marker: # TODO(cocoverify2:stimulus) END block_id=stimulus_reset_001 case_id=reset_001

Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.
Preserve conservative timing assumptions when exact behavior is unclear.
llm_todo_blocks.start_marker: # TODO(cocoverify2:stimulus) BEGIN block_id=stimulus_reset_001 case_id=reset_001

context.goal: Observe clock-driven state progress after reset, capturing both incrementing and decrementing behavior of the wave output.
stimulus_intent: Release reset if present and observe a small number of conservative clock edges for externally visible progress.
Release reset if present and observe a sufficient number of clock edges to capture at least one full up‑down cycle of the wave output.
timing_assumptions: Do not assume completion before it becomes externally visible.
Advance through conservative clocked observations; do not assume exact latency for direction changes.

llm_todo_blocks.end_marker: # TODO(cocoverify2:stimulus) END block_id=stimulus_basic_001 case_id=basic_001
instructions: Drive concrete legal values onto business inputs for this plan case.
Keep edits inside this TODO block so regeneration stays stable.
Preserve conservative timing assumptions when exact behavior is unclear.
llm_todo_blocks.start_marker: # TODO(cocoverify2:stimulus) BEGIN block_id=stimulus_basic_001 case_id=basic_001

context.goal: Validate that the waveform generator correctly changes direction at the boundaries 0 and 31.
stimulus_intent: Run the design without reset for enough clock cycles to observe a full up‑down traversal of the wave output.
timing_assumptions: Assume continuous clocking; do not rely on a fixed number of cycles for the boundary transitions.

llm_todo_blocks.end_marker: # TODO(cocoverify2:stimulus) END block_id=stimulus_edge_001 case_id=edge_001

generated_files.description: Marks the rendered cocotb test directory as a Python package.
Conservative DUT interface helpers derived from the contract artifact.
Thin environment wrapper that composes interface, timing-safe waits, and coverage helpers.
Structured oracle helper functions rendered from the oracle artifact.
Stable runtime helpers exposed to LLM-filled stimulus and oracle TODO blocks.
Coverage scaffold rendered from plan coverage tags for later execution stages.
Rendered basic cocotb tests aligned to structured plan cases.
Rendered edge cocotb tests aligned to structured plan cases.
Phase 4 executable Makefile shell; Phase 5 injects run-time variables and executes it.

render_warnings: Rendered Makefile is an executable Phase 4 shell; Phase 5 injects execution variables and selects the backend.
Task description was provided to the render stage but not used to invent new testbench semantics.
Spec text was provided to the render stage but only upstream artifacts were trusted for code generation.
Deterministic render remains the default mainline; post-render TODO fill is experimental and not required by the benchmark path.
